data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for check-in tracking, specifically 'who arrived, when'. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or data points that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but the prior steps do not provide any evidence of this feature being implemented or tested, indicating a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of check-in tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
